title: alphonsea ovata
intro: Alphonsea ovata, also known as the Malabar tigli or Indian jujube, is a plant species in the family Annonaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Alphonsea ovata include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against various diseases. Alphonsea ovata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
